# 性能风险分析（N170）
**Stable ID**: `PERF-027`
**Produced event**: `produced.n170.performance_design.v2`
**Stage**: `technical_solution_design.advanced_design.performance_risk_analysis`

---

## 1. SLO Triplet Derivation (R01_slo_triplet_complete = warn)
*No benchmark data available; all SLOs are **assumed** from PRD v0.4 functional scope and industry baselines for AI media tooling.*

| Metric | ideal | target | floor | Basis |
|--------|-------|--------|-------|-------|
| **Latency (p99)** | 280ms | 560ms | 2240ms | PRD v0.4 §3.2: "real-time preview" implies sub-1s UX tolerance; assumed 560ms target for AI inference + rendering pipeline (e.g., Stable Diffusion XL + FFmpeg encode). Ideal = ×0.5; floor = ×4 (not ×2) due to user-initiated retry tolerance on preview failure. |
| **Throughput** | 180 req/min | 90 req/min | 30 req/min | PRD v0.4 §4.1: "10 concurrent editors × 9 functions/hour avg" → 90 req/min peak steady-state. Ideal = ×2 headroom; floor = breach threshold triggering auto-throttling + notification. |
| **Error Rate** | <0.1% | <0.5% | >2.0% | PRD v0.4 §5.3: "critical path must preserve edit state" → strict error budget. Floor triggers rollback to last stable snapshot. |

> ✅ R01: `warn` — triplet complete but all values marked `assumption`. Confirmed in `references/v2-contract.md` §R07.

---

## 2. Hotspot Scan & B01–B10 Bottleneck Assessment (R02_10_bottleneck_all_analyzed = pass)

| ID | Bottleneck | at_risk | Detection Signal (inferred) | Capacity Threshold | Mitigation (mandatory if `at_risk: true`) |
|----|------------|---------|----------------------------|----------------------|------------------------------------------|
| **B01** | CPU-bound | `true` | AI model inference (SDXL, Whisper, LLaMA-3 fine-tuned) dominates compute; PRD v0.4 §2.7 lists 12+ GPU-accelerated ops per scene edit. | >80% GPU utilization sustained >2min | Offload inference to dedicated Triton server w/ dynamic batching; async queue + priority scheduling (per scene SLA tier). |
| **B02** | Memory-bound | `true` | High-res video frame buffers (4K×60fps), latent tensors, and multi-model context windows (e.g., story graph + shot list + audio alignment). | RSS >75% of 64GB container limit | Stream processing for video I/O; object pooling for tensor reuse; reduce in-memory aggregation via chunked story-graph serialization. |
| **B03** | Disk I/O bound | `false` | No explicit I/O volume projections; but PRD v0.4 §6.2 mandates local SSD cache for assets. Assumed provisioned IOPS sufficient. | Not applicable (pending `tables_and_indexes`) | — |
| **B04** | Network I/O bound | `true` | Inter-service latency between `scene-editor`, `audio-sync`, `render-orchestrator`, and external CDN (PRD v0.4 §7.4); high-frequency metadata sync (shot-level timestamps, emotion tags). | >70% of 10G NIC capacity on inter-zone links | Co-locate `editor` + `sync` + `orchestrator` in same AZ; compress metadata payloads (Protocol Buffers); implement connection pooling + keep-alive. |
| **B05** | Database bottleneck | `true` | PRD v0.4 §8.1 defines 15+ normalized tables with complex joins (e.g., `scene → shot → audio_track → emotion_tag`). High write frequency on `edit_history` and `asset_version`. | >80% connection pool utilization during batch render jobs | Introduce read replica for analytics/reporting; tune HikariCP (`maxLifetime=1800000`, `leakDetectionThreshold=60000`); add composite index on `(scene_id, version)` → 047. |
| **B06** | Cache bottleneck | `true` | PRD v0.4 §9.3 requires "instant preview" for recent edits → high cache churn; hot keys likely: `user:<id>:last_preview`, `scene:<id>:frame_buffer`. | Hit rate <80% (inferred from preview frequency × 10 users × 90 req/min) | Deploy local L1 cache (Caffeine) + Redis L2; apply singleflight on `get_preview_frame`; add random TTL jitter (±15%) on preview caches. |
| **B07** | External dependency | `true` | PRD v0.4 §10.2 integrates 3rd-party voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) and subtitle translation (DeepL). SLA not contractually defined. | Timeout rate >1% or p99 >1200ms on any call | Wrap all external calls in circuit breaker (Resilience4j); fallback to cached TTS samples; async outbox pattern for translation requests. |
| **B08** | Concurrency contention | `true` | PRD v0.4 §11.1 describes collaborative editing: multiple users modifying same `scene` → optimistic locking required per 049 design. Lock wait time expected >10ms under load. | Lock wait >5% of request time (inferred) | Enforce lock order: `scene → shot → asset`; use optimistic versioning on `scene` table; serialize conflicting edits via Kafka priority queue. |
| **B09** | Queue backlog | `true` | PRD v0.4 §12.4 defines 8+ async job types (render, transcode, QA scan, thumbnail gen). Consumer lag expected during peak batch renders. | Lag >10k messages sustained 2min | Autoscale consumers via HPA on `kafka_topic_lag{topic=~"job.*"}`; define DLQ alert at 500 messages; prioritize `render` and `QA` queues. |
| **B10** | GC pause | `false` | JVM heap not specified; but Java-based services (`editor-api`, `orchestrator`) likely used. Assumed ZGC configured. | GC pause >100ms p99 (pending `existing_perf_data`) | — |

> ✅ R02: `pass` — All 10 bottlenecks assessed. `at_risk: true` for B01, B02, B04, B05, B06, B07, B08, B09 → mitigation strategies provided.

---

## 3. Capacity Budget & Scaling Plan (R03_capacity_projected_3y = warn)
*Based on PRD v0.4 §4.2 volume projection: "100 creators × 5 scenes/day × 30 assets/scene" → ~15k assets/day, ~450k assets/year.*

| Unit of Work | Year 1 (est.) | Year 3 (est.) | Scaling Plan |
|--------------|--------------|---------------|--------------|
| **GPU Hours / day** | 120 hrs (A10G × 4) | 480 hrs (A10G × 16) | Auto-scale GPU nodes based on `inference_queue_length` + `gpu_utilization`. Reserve spot instances for non-critical jobs (thumbnail gen). |
| **DB Storage** | 2.1 TB (PostgreSQL) | 12.6 TB | Sharding by `creator_id` at 5TB; enable TimescaleDB for time-series telemetry. |
| **Cache Size** | 32 GB (Redis Cluster) | 128 GB | Scale Redis shards horizontally; monitor `evicted_keys` + `keyspace_hits`. |
| **Network Egress** | 12 TB/mo (CDN + preview streams) | 72 TB/mo | Negotiate tiered CDN pricing; pre-warm popular anime templates. |

> ⚠️ R03: `warn` — Projections derived from PRD assumptions only; no empirical telemetry. Requires validation in N210.

---

## 4. Degradation Strategy Matrix (R05_degradation_strategy_required = pass)

| Failure Mode | Degradation Action | User Impact | Recovery Trigger |
|--------------|---------------------|-------------|------------------|
| **B01/B02 overload** | Downsample preview resolution (1080p → 720p); disable real-time AI suggestions | Delayed feedback, reduced fidelity | GPU util <60% for 5min |
| **B04/B07 timeout** | Serve cached preview + show "refreshing…"; fallback TTS audio | Minor delay, no data loss | External API restored + cache warmed |
| **B05 connection exhaustion** | Reject new writes; allow reads + serve stale `scene` metadata | Edit save blocked; preview still works | Connection pool <70% utilized |
| **B09 queue backlog** | Pause low-priority jobs (thumbnail gen); throttle new job ingestion | Delayed asset processing | Lag <1k messages |
| **B06 cache miss storm** | Block concurrent cache rebuilds via singleflight; serve default template | Brief preview delay on first load | Cache hit rate >85% for 10min |

---

## 5. Performance Test Plan (R04_test_plan_derived = pass)

```yaml
performance_test_plan:
  target_api_or_flow: "POST /v1/scenes/{id}/preview"
  slo_under_test: {latency_p99: "560ms", throughput: "90 req/min", error_rate: "0.5%"}
  test_types:
    load_test:    {enabled: true, scenario: "90 req/min sustained ≥30min", ramp_up: "5min", success_criteria: "p99 < 560ms && error_rate < 0.5%"}
    stress_test:  {enabled: true, scenario: "ramp to 270 req/min until failure", observe: "degradation behavior, recovery time after throttle"}
    spike_test:   {enabled: true, scenario: "0 → 270 req/min in 10s", success_criteria: "60s recovery to p99 < 560ms"}
    soak_test:    {enabled: true, scenario: "45 req/min sustained 24h", observe: "RSS growth, GC overhead, cache hit rate drift"}
    breakpoint_test: {enabled: false, scenario: "add pressure until error_rate > 5%"}
  environment:  {target: "staging", data_volume: "1:10 vs prod (10 creators, 50 scenes)", dependencies: "mock ElevenLabs/DeepL, real PostgreSQL/Redis/Kafka"}
  tools:        {recommended: "k6", rationale: "supports WebSocket + multipart upload + custom metrics; integrates with Grafana for real-time SLO dashboards"}
  rollback_condition: "error_rate > 10% sustained for 2min OR p99 > 2240ms for 1min"
  derived_from:
    api_refs: ["N150-SCENE-PREVIEW"]
    flow_refs: ["N160-SCENE-EDIT-FLOW"]
    concurrency_refs: ["049-SCENE-LOCKING"]
    requirement_refs: ["PRD-v0.4-§3.2", "PRD-v0.4-§4.1"]
```
